subcodes.first_line: After acknowledgment of the oneness of God and confession of that which His Prophets and Messengers brought forth, and their Seal, Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از اقرار بتوحید باری و اعتراف بما اتی به انبیائه و رسله و ختمهم بمحمد
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @business; financial; property matters
